title: tessenia
intro: Tessenia is a plant species, scientifically known as Tessenia retusa, which belongs to the family of flowering plants. The tessenia plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of tessenia plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of kidney stones, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of tessenia plant, such as teas and infusions, are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
